f2p_added: preserves inline math LaTeX syntax in quoted text
preserves block math LaTeX syntax in quoted text
preserves standalone data-math elements without container
notes: Instruction points to a real GitHub issue (#421) — quote-reply strips LaTeX delimiters when quoting math equations. Patch (+147/-1) adds extractTextWithLatex() helper + replaceMathWithLatex() + 3 vitest test cases in quoteReply.test.ts. Original install_config.json declared 17 F2P entries — 14 of those names do not exist anywhere in the canonical patch (likely scaffold hallucination). Trimmed FAIL_TO_PASS down to the 3 actual it(...) names from the patch. Names are bare it() text since parse_log_vitest captures only the test description (verbose reporter format ✓ <name> <duration>). Tests are behavioral (DOM-level: assert input.textContent contains LaTeX delimiters) — implementation-agnostic, low over-fit risk. Repo_dir=/workspace/repo aligns with Dockerfile.
